titleStmt.title: SII 25.242: original edition by M. D. Sampath
No. 242.

summary.p: Slab set up near the north prākāra of the temple of Dantēśvarī.
This inscription may palaeographically be assigned to c. 12th Century.

It refers to the reign of Rājabhūshaṇa, a king of the Chinda-kula. It states that the king belonged to the Nāgavaṁśa. He had a tiger crest. It records a grant made by Māsakadēvī. Also reference is made to Chakragoṭṭamu, being occupied by rāchakoḍukulu (crown-princes or sons of the king). It seems that the mention of different kāṁpulu, balaṁjalu, vaḍugāra jāyalu, sommarivāru, nāḍigāṁ, jōrigāṁpulu, illagaṭṭina-kāṁpulu, pulla-kāṁpulu, etc., in connection with the grant, indicate their presence as witnesses to the grant.
We know from the Kuruspāl inscriptions of Dhāraṇa-mahādēvī that Rājabhūshaṇa was an epithet of king Sōmēśvaradēva.
The reference to Chakragoṭṭamu as the residence of princes of the Nāgavaṁśi family in this record is interesting.
Published in South Indian Inscriptions, Vol. X, No. 650.

revisionDesc.change: Conversion of digital encoding to DHARMA encoding scheme according to EGD (Encoding Guide for Diplomatic Editions)

div.p:
svasti saha sra phaṇāmaṇiki
raṇanika rāvabhāsura (rāvabhāsura)Repeated by mistake.
nāgavaṁśōdbhava bhōgāvatī
pura paramēśvara viśada ja
ya paṭu paṭahagāṁbhīryya
dhvānālaṁkārita daśadiśā
ṁktarāla dhēnu vyāghralāṁccha
na cindakula tilaka kamala
bhāskara mahāmahēśvara ca
raṇa kamalasēvita kiṁjalka
puṁja piṁjarita jamarāyamā
na śrīma drājabhūṣaṇa mahā
rājulakuṁ selliya beṁkaṇṭi mā
saka dēvi paṭṭuna sthiti 162
na nāḍu rājula yalgisavāratama
yaṅginavārugānu rājula śaricina
vāru tamaśaricina vārugānu duṁ
si sōmanicciri kē kunakuṇḍa sēnu
paratānu cci

sitamu
lēkuṇḍa
rājulaku
midasandu
ppakuṇḍa
sanani
yādvinaya
ṇḍugālu
maṁgi ṇḍaku
ṇa ko
ni vāninde
ccina rāju
lalgi kolla
maṁ jaṁpi
sannaṁ jakra
goṭṭamu
naṁgala rā
ca koḍuku
lu nāyaku
luṁ gāṁpu
lu paṁcama
hāsthānamu
la vārunu
mēlpakāṟu
sēnalu

liccina mīyū
kālāntaraṁbuna nevvaraina rājulu ṭṭa
mu gaṭṭina nāṇḍiyūru lēdu yēmayina
vāri tiṟu paṭṭāniṁgaṁ gonnadi vāri
ṁ būrvvamuna dunniyeḍa nellaṁ kāṁpulella vā
ri vāru balaṁjalu vaḍugāravalulaṁ jā
yaluṁ sommarivāru ḍaṟu nōḍavāru nāḍi
gāṁjōrigāṁpulellaru kāṁpulu Illagaṭṭi
na kāṁpula navi pullakāṁpu satkasuṁtamu naniya
tkaḍaṁgāni palānu ru nadilē
vaccina ja nasēsi narāja kōna da
ṇḍānu duṣṭani jētuna kuṇḍa satvā
ji lōpala vracci lēkuṇḍanu rājuku
vāratamakūriyanā vāru rājula
ratama linavāru sāsanaddānanādi kuṇḍa
ni yintākuṁ ni māsaka dēvī paṭṭuna maha si
kala sēsipeṭṭiri yī maryyāda nimidasdappi
vāradavula kulakulamellamānuku dēvadina
rājulaku parama drōhula gāduru
naṁ jakragoṭṭamunagalavāri koḍukulu nāya
kuluṁ gāṁpulū pūrvvula payyatti duva
vāru vīrilōpala nevvaraina vāri tappu bi
gi neppanivāṇḍu galaṇḍēni vāṇḍunu para
ma drōhuṇḍu rācakuṁḍu kayyenayakuṇḍayya
gāṁpayya ni lōpali mu
mma naṁgalayaṁ
illegible and damaged
Digital edition of SII 25.242 by automatically converted to DHARMA conventions.
